exercises.title: Convert Cartesian to Polar
exercises.content: Given a point at Cartesian (3, 4), find polar (r, θ). Hint: use distance formula r = √(x² + y²) and angle θ.
hints: The point is 5 units away at 53° angle

exercises.title: When is Polar Better?
exercises.content: For each: circular motion, rectangular grid, spinning top, city block grid—say if Polar or Cartesian is better and why.
